calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/E. Bura, CSR: Sara Lerschen
Petitioner: Richard Y.M. Chen, present in pro per and as guardian ad litem for Minors: Michael X.W. Chen and Gina X.S. Chen and with Mandarin Interpreter: Shirley Xie. Petitioner Declaration of Minor's mother consenting to the name change filed in open court.
and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objection to the proposed change of names was made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Richard Y.M. Lee and
for Change of Name of Minors to: Michael X.W. Lee and Gina X.S. Lee
Decree signed in open court.
